title: Logz.io Search Request
description: Request body for the Logz.io /v1/search API. Wraps an Elasticsearch-compatible query DSL payload, optionally targeting specific accounts and time windows. Mirrors the upstream Elasticsearch _search request body so existing Lucene / DSL queries port unmodified.

query.description: Elasticsearch query DSL. Supports bool / match / range / term and aggregations.

size.description: Maximum number of hits to return.

sort.description: Sort clauses applied to the result set.

_source.description: Source filtering — boolean or array of field names.

accountIds.description: Optional list of associated account IDs to scope the query across the multi-account hierarchy.

accountIdsAndNames.description: Optional list of accounts identified by both id and name.
